commands: aws ecr get-login-password --region ap-south-1 | docker login --username AWS --password-stdin 381491873099.dkr.ecr.ap-south-1.amazonaws.com > /dev/null 2>&1
export DATABASE_URL=$(aws ssm get-parameter --name /staye/prod/DATABASE_URL --with-decryption --query Parameter.Value --output text)

docker run --rm -e DATABASE_URL 381491873099.dkr.ecr.ap-south-1.amazonaws.com/staye-backend:latest node -e "const { Client } = require('pg'); const c = new Client({ connectionString: process.env.DATABASE_URL, ssl: { rejectUnauthorized: false } }); c.connect().then(() => c.query('SELECT email, role, \"plainTextPassword\", \"hashedPassword\", \"cognitoSub\" FROM \"User\"')).then(r => console.log(JSON.stringify(r.rows, null, 2))).catch(console.error).finally(() => c.end());" 2>&1 | base64
